title: SystemVerilog logic array inside struct should warn on bad index

features.name: packed struct with logic array fields at non-zero offset
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing logic array fields where the field's bit range does not start at offset 0 (e.g., logic [31:20] field_name)

features.name: bit-index access to struct field with array type
features.description: Code should include accessing a specific bit index of a logic array field inside a packed struct using the dot notation followed by array index (e.g., struct_obj.field[11])
